posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi how are you . I have noticed there is an option to take photos from a webcam device connected to the PC. This is avaliable for files column as seen on screenshot:

image1188×414 30.7 KB

The feature requeriment is to set this button for updates section too, this will be extremely useful when our people report their jobs.
